name: Forward Industries, Inc.
summary: Forward Industries, Inc. (FWDI) is a design company providing hardware and software product design and engineering services to medical and technology customers predominantly in the U.S., through subsidiaries including IPS and Kablooe. Services span electrical, mechanical, software, optical engineering, UX/UI design, and IoT architecture. The company also adopted Solana (SOL) as its primary treasury reserve asset in September 2025, pursuing staking, DeFi participation, and capital markets strategies within the Solana ecosystem.
